info.title: Navigator API - User
info.description: User-facing API endpoints for the Navigator application

post.description: Validates the Kinde Bearer token, upserts the user in the local database, and returns the user's current profile. Call this on every login.

Create a new organization.
Only super_admin users with no organization can create organizations.

get.description: List all available roles. Requires 'org:view' permission.

schema.title: Response List Roles Rbac Roles Get

get.description: List all available permissions. Requires 'org:view' permission.

schema.title: Response List Permissions Rbac Permissions Get

get.description: Get role details with its permissions. Requires 'org:view' permission.
Get current user's permissions based on their role.

post.description:
Create an invite to join the current user's organization.
Requires 'employee:invite' permission.
User must belong to an organization.

The invite will be sent via email with a secure token.

get.description:
List all pending invites for the current user's organization.
Requires 'employee:view' permission.

Step 1: Verify an invite token is valid.
This endpoint does not require authentication.

Returns confirmation if token is valid and not expired.
Does not create the user account or expose invite details.

post.description:
Step 2: Accept an invite and create a new user account.
This endpoint does not require authentication.

Creates the user in both Kinde and the local database,
assigns them to the organization, and marks the invite as accepted.

get.description:
Get a specific invite by ID.
Only returns invites belonging to the current user's organization.
Requires 'employee:view' permission.

post.description:
Resend an invite with a new token.
Requires 'resend:invitation' permission.
Only works for invites in the current user's organization.

delete.description:
Revoke an existing invitation.
Requires 'revoke:invitation' permission.
Only works for invites in the current user's organization.

post.description:
Create a new group within the organization.
Requires 'group:create' permission.

get.description:
List all groups in the organization.
Requires 'group:view' permission.

Get a specific group with its members.
Requires 'group:view' permission.

patch.description:
Update a group's details.
Requires 'group:update' permission.

post.description:
Add members to a group.
Requires 'group:manage_members' permission.

delete.description:
Remove members from a group.
Requires 'group:manage_members' permission.

get.description:
Get all groups a user belongs to.
Requires 'group:view' permission.

schema.title: Response Get User Groups Groups User  User Id  Get

post.description:
Create a new folder within the organization.
Requires 'folder:create' permission.

get.description:
List all folders in the organization.
Requires 'folder:view' permission.

Get a specific folder with its files.
Requires 'folder:view' permission.

patch.description:
Update a folder's details.
Requires 'folder:update' permission.

delete.description:
Delete a folder and all its files.
Requires 'folder:delete' permission.

get.description:
Get statistics for a folder.
Requires 'folder:view' permission.

post.description:
Upload one or multiple files to a folder.
Requires 'file:upload' permission.
Allowed file types: PDF, DOCX, PPT
Maximum file size: 50 MB per file

Can accept:
- Single file: Select one file in the form
- Multiple files: Hold Ctrl/Cmd and select multiple files in the form

get.description:
Get file details.
Requires 'file:view' permission.

patch.description:
Update a file's details.
Requires 'file:update' permission.

get.description:
List all files in a folder.
Requires 'file:view' permission.

schema.title: Response List Files Files Folder  Folder Id  List Get

delete.description:
Delete one or multiple files.
Requires 'file:delete' permission.

Can delete:
- Single file: file_ids=[<file_id>]
- Multiple files: file_ids=[<file_id1>, <file_id2>, <file_id3>]

get.description:
Get a presigned download URL for a file.
Requires 'file:download' permission.

post.description:
Extract text from a file using Gemini 2.5 Flash OCR.
Requires 'file:view' permission.

Supported file types:
- Images (PNG, JPG, JPEG, etc.)
- PDF documents
- Word documents (DOCX, DOC)
- PowerPoint presentations (PPTX, PPT)

Extract text from a file and optionally store its embedding in TurboBuffer.
Requires 'file:view' permission.

This is a combined operation that:
1. Extracts text using Gemini OCR
2. Generates embeddings using Gemini
3. Stores embeddings in TurboBuffer (folder-based namespace)

Search for similar documents within a folder using vector similarity.
Requires 'folder:view' permission.

Each folder has its own namespace in TurboBuffer, ensuring isolation
between different folders.

delete.description:
Delete a file's embedding from TurboBuffer.
Requires 'file:delete' permission.

Delete entire folder namespace from TurboBuffer.
This removes all embeddings for files in the folder.
Requires 'folder:delete' permission.

post.description:
Create a new OCR job for background processing.
The job will be automatically enqueued and processed in the background.
Requires 'file:view' permission.

get.description:
Get the status and progress of an OCR job.
Use this endpoint to poll for real-time progress updates.
Requires 'file:view' permission.

Get the most recent OCR job for a specific file.
Requires 'file:view' permission.

List all OCR jobs for a folder.
Optionally filter by status (pending, processing, completed, failed, cancelled).
Requires 'folder:view' permission.

post.description:
Retry a failed OCR job.
Only failed jobs can be retried.
Requires 'file:view' permission.

Cancel a pending or processing OCR job.
Completed, failed, or already cancelled jobs cannot be cancelled.
Requires 'file:view' permission.

get.description:
Get OCR job statistics for the organization.
Shows counts of jobs by status.
Requires 'folder:view' permission.
